ground_truth.title: Custom Software Development in San Francisco — Devox Software
ground_truth.main_content:
Welcome to Devox Software, your ultimate Software development company in San Francisco. We build future-proof and innovative solutions to boost your business’s growth.

Our Software Development Services in San Francisco

Software Development Outsourcing Services
We are a group of vetted software development professionals who provide full-cycle tech services for global businesses. Whether it’s a corporate application or a simple mobile app, we can help you fulfill your project goals and implement business vision with industry-best tech stacks.

Web Application Services
Outsource Software development services in San Francisco to amplify your business-critical web project. Devox Software is the leading web app company that offers a variety of services related to the design, development, and maintenance of a website or web application.

Mobile Application Services
Attract new audiences via mobile or amplify your existing solution. Our teams of mobile app developers are always glad to support the ongoing project or build a native or hybrid mobile application from scratch.

Digital Consulting
Make the most of your tech capabilities and get expert guidance in the digital transformation of your business. Our Software development company San Francisco tech consultants can share their expertise in deciding on the proper technology stack, platform, or solution architecture.

Development Teams
Expand your tech team on demand with no administrative burdens. Our outsourcing Software development company San Francisco offers dedicated teams to support your development process. Build a full-scale development team by scaling your team’s capacity and covering specific project needs.

End-to-End Software Development Services in San Francisco
Let us build your digital product by covering the full-scale development process from ideation to product maintenance. Our team can take over your project, including its architecture, UX/UI, and deployment. Thus, you may focus on your business objectives.

Quality Assurance
Provide a bug-free product that caters to your end-users. Our QA engineers can take over your product testing or ensure the quality of a working solution using manual and/or automation techniques.

DevOps
Make your Software development in San Francisco efficient by leveraging the expertise of our DevOps. We will extend your team with an engineer from our database, or assemble a custom-hired team for your specific goals.

Our Professional Software Development Process

Discovery
We start by analyzing your San Francisco-based business’s goals and project planning. For that, we name the problem and scope of your result, as well as chart out essential functionality and milestones.

Design and Development
At this stage, we outline the project details, including the necessary network requirements, databases, and others. Then, our Software development team build the product according to the predetermined design needs. The ability to follow the initial concept with fewer efforts and budget makes us an excellent Software development agency San Francisco.

Full-Cycle Testing
Our extra-class QA engineers ensure that end-user experience is impeccable and bug-free. We perform comprehensive testing, including front-end, database, and server testing, as well as other checks.

Deployment
Our programmers then deploy a solution into the target environment. After that, the solution is ready for the San Francisco market and is accessible for end-users.

Maintenance
Once your solution is up, our programmers monitor its performance and analyze user feedback to provide further enhancements. We also implement any changes required after deployment.

Technologies We Use

Back End: C++, NestJS, Flask, Django, Express.js, .NET, PHP, Ruby, Java Spring, Python
Front End: OpenCV, Next.js, Svelte, Vue.js, Angular, React.js, PWA, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML/CSS
DevOps & Cloud: Conan, Cmake, Github Actions, CUDA, Datadog, Grafana, Kubernetes, Podman, Docker, Google Cloud
Database Development: MariaDB, Redis, Cassandra, MongoDB, Oracle DB, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, MySQL
Web 3: EVM, Arbitrum, NOWNodes, Web3.js, Hardhat, Ethers.js, OpenZeppelin, Chainlink, Truffle, Moralis
Artificial Intelligence: DL4J, Chainer, OpenCV, CNTK, Caffe, Theano

How do We Make Software Development in San Francisco Safe?

Sound Privacy Property
We respect intellectual property rights, that’s why we always begin our work by signing a non-disclosure agreement (NDA). With this document, you can share the details of your project safely. After you decide on hiring and pricing models, we sign a contract that guarantees the fulfillment of the stipulated terms and conditions.

Meticulous Testing
The high quality of our end Software development product is our key priority. We have a team of quality assurance engineers who will take care of your project at every phase of Software development in San Francisco. Our specialists use Functional, System, Stress, Performance, Usability, and Acceptance testing techniques to be sure that your product is bug-free when released.

Relevant Skills
We prioritize hiring only pre-vetted employees with certifications and hands-on experience. Every project is analyzed and examined by the CTO. Together, we determine the needed tech stack and seniority level for your future team. We also take over the hiring and screening process to get the best hires. Our recruitment team has a technical background, thus our Software developers San Francisco are thoroughly chosen and relevant in terms of both hard and soft skills.

English Proficiency
A special feature of our Software development outsourcing services in San Francisco is direct communication between clients and their remote teams. That’s why all our developers have strong English-speaking skills and perfect them on site. We hold corporate English classes to ensure smooth communication.

Data Security
We pay significant attention to keeping your data secure. To do that, we audit the project that ensures your data remains secure. Our Software development company San Francisco also ensures your solution corresponds to local regulatory requirements in San Francisco and the state.

Contract Transparency
Our outsourcing contract clearly depicts services to be provided, key performance indicators, duration, and other significant features of our Software development in San Francisco. Study this document thoroughly for better comprehension.

Managed Custom Software Delivery
As a technology partner, we deliver end-to-end products with AI-augmented, cross-functional squads across architecture, FE/BE, data/BI, QA, and DevOps.

Benefits of Our Software Development Services in San Francisco

Powerful Front-End
Our efficient Software development company San Francisco makes sure your solution is wrapped into a strong interface with fast boot times and engaging UX design. We harmonize the UI and business framework to deliver user-friendly experiences.

Robust Back-End
Scalable architecture is what makes a winning solution. Our back-end engineers will build a flexible API-friendly back-end with advanced data structures and elastic computing capacity.

Diverse Expertise
As a Software development company San Francisco, we offer a range of technologies to deliver top-notch Software assets. Besides fundamental technologies like Java and PHP, we can enhance your solution with modern tech stacks.

Security
We prioritize security as one of the pillars of successful digital transformation. That’s why we develop with security in mind, paying attention to authentication and authorization services, access control, and others.

Experienced Specialists
We get Software development in San Francisco done by top native or cross-platform programmers. Our company comprises engineers with vast experience and knowledge of diverse tech stacks.

Cost-Efficiency
You can choose the pricing model that fits your project best. Be it hourly rate, fixed price or monthly salary, Software development outsourcing with Devox Software is a cost-efficient decision in San Francisco.

Develop in San Francisco with Devox
Entrust your future product to Devox: we’ll combine elaborated business proposition with diligently written code, strong architecture and cybersecurity, intuitive UI/UX and full customization either to your business or your demanding client.

Why Choose Devox Software?

Vetted Software Developer San Francisco
As an experienced professional Software development company, we employ certified Software developer San Francisco with proficiency in digital technologies. We also make sure our hires are familiar with the current technologies and frameworks.

Client-Focused Approach
We create your team according to your unique business goals. This allows us to ensure a perfect talent match and an excellent tech stack for your project.

Easy Hiring
We can extend your team in a few days. Our Software development company San Francisco also takes over all administrative hurdles like employee benefits, training, and equipment costs.

Transparency
Our partnership will be based on a comprehensive outsourcing contract that clearly defines the scope of work, terms, budget, and deadlines.

Full-Cycle Software Development
Our team of developers offers end-to-end Software development services San Francisco, from concept to maintenance. We can also take over your project mid-development to complete it.

Scalability
Change your team size to your present business needs by ramping up and down your tech talent. Thanks to easy hiring, you get dedicated team members fast and on demand.

Our Vision
We’ve worked extensively in terms of geography and sector, developing a variety of work — products, services, and experiences — that has taught us that a well-defined visual strategy is key to bring visibility, credibility, and funds to any organisation. Starting in 2017, we decided to plant a tree for each client that we work with.

Successfully completed projects: 70+
Devox Software annual growth: 71%
Tech specialists on board: 100+
Clients with us for more than 2 years: 82%

Our Latest Works

Humanising Autonomy: Behavioral AI SDK for Humanized Driver Assistance Systems (HDAS)
A computer vision SDK for predicting road user behavior and enhancing driver safety.

Joynd: Unified Integration Platform for HR Software Providers
A robust B2B platform that connects companies and HR software providers through federated identity, intelligent workflows, and secure data integrations.

Trading System for Confidential Market Execution
A fintech trading system enabling anonymous, low-impact transactions between institutional players.
